outcome_record.event_name: EuroLeague 2026-27 Playoffs QF Game 3 — Real Madrid vs Fenerbahçe

prediction.pre_match_note: EuroLeague Playoff QF Game 3. Series tied 1-1. Game 3 on Real Madrid home floor. ELS Real Madrid 0.94. Best-of-5 series: tied 1-1 means both teams equally motivated. Home floor advantage in tied series. Game 5 would be away for Madrid — maximum Game 3 motivation.

calibration_flags.notes: EuroLeague playoff home floor advantage in tied series validated. Game 3 on home floor when series tied 1-1 = maximum motivation (avoiding road Game 5). Best-of-5 series momentum model confirmed. Second EuroLeague calibration record.
